_comment: Yellow variant of routes.json. Overworld maps (Pallet, Route 1, Viridian, Route 2, Pewter) share Red's layouts; Viridian Forest was rearranged in Yellow, so its waypoints are reduced to the exit target and the WorldMap planner explores the maze (cross_step sweeps the top boundary for the true exit column).

waypoints.note: North through gap — x=10 is the walkable corridor
Oak trigger tile — only x=10 is open at y=1
Yellow Oak trigger row — pokeyellow PalletTownDefaultScript fires at wYCoord==0, one tile past Red's trigger

12.name: Route 1
12._comment: Northbound to Viridian. NOT a loop — the old grind loop never exited north, which stranded the agent before the Oak's Parcel gate (the parcel quest needs to reach Viridian).

waypoints.note: Weave east around the first ledge
Exit north to Viridian Forest entrance
North exit toward Pewter — layout differs from Red; WorldMap explores, cross_step sweeps the top boundary for the real exit column
